title: Warsh Vows to Deliver Price Stability, Fed ‘Regime Change’
title_cn: 沃什誓言要实现价格稳定，美联储“政权改变”
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said policymakers at the central bank have no tolerance for high inflation, reiterating a vow to tame price growth that has been elevated for five years.

title: Oil Pares Gains as Trump Backs Off 20% Fee for Hormuz Shipments
title_cn: 特朗普取消霍尔木兹运输 20% 的费用，油价上涨

title: Francisco Partners Nears $1.3 Billion Deal to Buy Construction Software Maker Command Alkon
title_cn: Francisco Partners 接近 13 亿美元收购建筑软件制造商 Command Alkon
summary: Buyout firm Francisco Partners is in advanced talks to acquire a controlling stake in construction software maker Command Alkon Inc. for as much as $1.3 billion, a sign that investors still see value in sector-specific software.

title_cn: 洪都拉斯启动债券回购，寻求出售新的全球债务
summary: Honduras is looking to buy back bonds and tap global markets for the first time since 2024, joining this year’s borrowing spree in emerging markets.

summary: Thomson Reuters Corp. agreed to sell a 51% stake in its legal and tax publishing business to investment firm KKR & Co. in a $500 million deal.

title: Warsh Says Fed Has ‘No Tolerance’ for Elevated Inflation
title_cn: 沃什称美联储“不能容忍”通胀上升
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh gives his opening remarks before questioning from members of the House Financial Services Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Asks State Banks to Step Up Foreign Currency Deposits
title_cn: 印度要求国有银行增加外币存款
summary: India has asked state-owned banks to intensify efforts to garner foreign currency deposits from the 35-million-strong diaspora, as the country seeks to boost its external buffers and shore up the flagging rupee.

title: Stocks, Bonds Rise as Soft CPI Curbs Fed-Hike Bets: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于消费者物价指数疲软抑制美联储加息押注，股票和债券上涨：市场结束
summary: A cooler-than-estimated inflation reading spurred gains in both stocks and bonds, easing concern about the potential for imminent Federal Reserve rate hikes amid a resurgence in oil prices.

title: Fuel Markets in US and Europe Are Flashing Record Tightness
title_cn: 美国和欧洲的燃料市场出现创纪录的紧张状况
summary: Fuel markets in the US and Europe are flashing record tightness as tensions flare up in the Middle East, threatening more pain for consumers already strained with high prices at the pump.

title: Why Stellar Bank Earnings Aren't Enough
title_cn: 为什么出色的银行盈利还不够
summary: Baird Senior Research Analyst David George joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why stellar bank earnings aren't translating into stock gains. He says investors are facing a "buy the rumor, sell the news" moment as expectations reached extreme levels, while emphasizing that banks are far safer than before the financial crisis and that the US consumer remains resilient despite broader economic concerns. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fatal ICE Shooting Draws Maine Vigils as Scrutiny Grows
title_cn: 随着审查力度加大，致命的冰上枪击事件引起缅因州守夜
summary: Security footage obtained by The Associated Press shows the aftermath of the shooting of a man in Maine by ICE officers, including a white car circling in an intersection, a law enforcement SUV stopping the car and agents opening the door and pulling out a body. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Says Fed Has 'No Tolerance' for Persistent Inflation
title_cn: 沃什称美联储“不能容忍”持续通胀
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said policymakers at the central bank have no tolerance for high inflation during remarks to the House Financial Services Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US CPI Falls for the First Time Since 2020, Core Gauge Flat
title_cn: 美国CPI自2020年以来首次下降，核心指标持平
summary:
US consumer prices declined in June for the first time in six years and a key gauge of underlying inflation was little changed, taking some pressure off the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.
Frances Donald, Chief Economist at RBC Capital Markets, reacts to June CPI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Polymarket Partners With Crypto Firm During World Cup
title_cn: Polymarket 在世界杯期间与加密货币公司合作
summary: Crypto brokerage Blockchain.com Group Holdings Inc. has partnered with Polymarket to offer prediction markets to its users in time for the World Cup semifinals.

title: SK Hynix Early ADR Options Trading Leans to Short-Term Contracts
title_cn: SK 海力士早期 ADR 期权交易倾向于短期合约
summary: Options on SK Hynix Inc.’s American Depository Receipts began trading on US options exchanges Tuesday, giving traders in the world’s largest derivatives market easier access to the volatile South Korean memory chipmaker.

title: Rockefeller Capital's Fleming: I Regret Having to Sell Merrill Lynch
title_cn: 洛克菲勒资本的弗莱明：我很遗憾不得不出售美林
summary: Rockefeller Capital Management President and CEO Greg Fleming says selling Merrill Lynch remains his biggest career regret, reflecting on whether more could have been done to preserve the iconic firm. This interview was recorded for Bloomberg Wealth with David Rubenstein on May 13, 2026.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US CPI Falls for the First Time Since 2020, Core Gauge Flat
title_cn: 美国CPI自2020年以来首次下降，核心指标持平
summary: US consumer prices declined in June for the first time in six years and a key gauge of underlying inflation was little changed, taking some pressure off the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

title: ‘We Faltered’: IBM Falls Most Since At Least 1968 on Sales Miss
title_cn: “我们步履蹒跚”：IBM 因销售失误而跌幅至少为 1968 年以来最大
summary: International Business Machines Corp. shares slid by the most in at least 58 years after the company reported preliminary second-quarter sales that fell short of expectations, attributing the miss to customers shifting their spending to chips and servers amid AI-fueled shortages.

title: Software Stocks Sink as IBM Miss Delivers ‘Devastating Blow’
title_cn: IBM 小姐遭遇“毁灭性打击”，软件股暴跌
summary: Shares of software and IT services companies plunged Tuesday after International Business Machines Corp. reported preliminary results that missed analyst expectations, reigniting questions about the sector.

title: Treasuries Rally as Cool CPI Data Cuts July Fed Hike Bets to 20%
title_cn: 酷炫 CPI 数据将 7 月美联储加息预期下调至 20%，国债上涨
summary: US Treasuries rallied and traders pulled back from bets on near-term Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes after consumer prices data came in lower than forecast.

title: Emerging Market Assets Rally as US CPI Data Trims Rate Hike Bets
title_cn: 美国消费物价指数 (CPI) 数据削减加息押注，新兴市场资产上涨
summary: Emerging-market assets rallied after a cooler-than-expected US inflation report prompted traders to pare bets on imminent Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes, boosting demand for riskier assets.

title: US Stocks Advance as Traders Parse CPI Data, Warsh Comments
title_cn: Warsh 评论称，随着交易员分析 CPI 数据，美国股市上涨
summary: US stocks rose on Tuesday as investors parsed latest inflation data and Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh’s remarks.

title: Deutsche Bank May Win Russia Sanctions Lawsuit Against Linde
title_cn: 德意志银行可能赢得针对林德的俄罗斯制裁诉讼
summary: Deutsche Bank AG may win a legal battle in a dispute with a corporate client over who has to pick up the tab for losses linked to sanctions on Russia, according to a German court.

title: US CPI Falls for the First Time Since 2020
title_cn: 美国CPI自2020年以来首次下降
summary: The US consumer price index fell 0.4% in June, dragged down by the biggest decline in gasoline prices since 2022, taking some pressure off the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates. Tiffany Wilding, economist at Pimco, examines the data on “Bloomberg Surveillance.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Credit Suisse Veteran Named $5 Billion Firm’s Abu Dhabi CEO
title_cn: 瑞士信贷资深人士被任命为价值 50 亿美元的公司阿布扎比首席执行官
summary: Azura Partners, a wealth advisor backed by one of the Middle East’s largest alternative asset managers, named Credit Suisse veteran Yousef Hajjar to oversee its Abu Dhabi operations.

title: Russia Struggles to Sell All the Oil It's Being Forced to Export
title_cn: 俄罗斯努力出售其被迫出口的所有石油
summary: The amount of Moscow’s oil at sea is back near the highs seen at the start of the year

title: Barito Makes More Than $5 Billion Takeover Bid for EDC
title_cn: Barito 对 EDC 提出超过 50 亿美元的收购要约
summary: Indonesia’s PT Barito Renewables Energy has made an offer to buy geothermal company Energy Development Corp. to expand in the Philippines, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Citi Stock Traders Post Record Revenue for Quarter
title_cn: 花旗股票交易员季度收入创历史新高
summary: Citigroup says revenue from equities trading surged 45% to $2.3 billion in the second quarter from a year earlier. That's 11% higher than the record set in this year's opening months. Earnings per share came in at $3.15, beating all estimates. This is coverage from "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Small Amount of Nvidia AI Chips Shipped to China With US License
title_cn: 少量英伟达人工智能芯片经美国许可运往中国
summary: A small number of Nvidia Corp.’s H200 artificial intelligence chips have been shipped to customers in China after winning US approval, the Trump administration official who oversees export control programs confirmed.

title: Why the AI Boom Is Making Everything More Expensive
title_cn: 为什么人工智能的繁荣让一切变得更加昂贵
summary: AI demand is triggering a historic memory-chip shortage. Overcoming it will be costly, and maybe even impossible.

title: India’s Udaan Secures $160 Million to Boost Finances Before IPO
title_cn: 印度 Udaan 在 IPO 前融资 1.6 亿美元以增加财务状况
summary: Indian business-to-business e-commerce firm Udaan has lined up $160 million in funding to bolster its balance sheet as it prepares for a capital markets listing.

title: IBM Falls Most Since At Least 1968 on Sales Miss
title_cn: IBM 因销售业绩不佳而跌幅至少自 1968 年以来最大
summary:
International Business Machines Corp. shares slid by the most in at least 58 years after the company reported preliminary second-quarter sales that fell short of expectations, attributing the miss to customers shifting their spending to chips and servers amid AI-fueled shortages. 
Anurag Rana, Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Tech Analyst, discusses the miss and what it means for IBM as well as the broader tech sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IBM Falls on Sales Miss; JPMorgan Soars on Equities Trading Beat | Stock Movers
title_cn: IBM 销售失败；摩根大通因股票交易强劲而飙升库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers:

- IBM (IBM) shares are plummeting after the company reported preliminary second-quarter sales that fell short of expectations, attributing the miss to customers spending their money on chips and servers amid AI-fueled shortages.
- Bank of America (BAC), JPMorgan (JPM), and Wells Fargo (WFC) all reported early this morning. Wells Fargo reported second-quarter earnings that beat Wall Street estimates on higher fees from wealth management and investment banking. JPMorgan soared past all estimates on equities trading, but missed on FICC sales and trading revenue. Bank of America net interest income met estimates. Shares have oscillated in early trading.
- Apple (AAPL) shares are falling after being cut to underweight from sector weight at KeyBanc, which expects weaker device demand and service revenue growth in the US, a dynamic that makes the stock look unfavorable due to its high valuations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Latest CPI Report Is a Huge Relief for Investors, Says Santos of JPM Asset Management
title_cn: 摩根大通资产管理公司的桑托斯表示，最新的消费者物价指数报告让投资者松了一口气
summary: Gabriela Santos, Chief Market Strategist for the Americas at JPMorgan Asset Management joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explains why the latest CPI report could keep the Fed on hold, why AI infrastructure spending is squeezing software companies and why investors should stay selective as AI stocks become more volatile. She also breaks down what upcoming tech earnings could mean for the next move in markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DeepSeek Is Preparing For IPO Filing as Soon as This Year
title_cn: DeepSeek 最快今年准备 IPO 申请
summary: Chinese AI pioneer DeepSeek has begun preparations for an initial public offering and may file as soon as this year, setting the stage for what could be a landmark debut for the country’s technology industry.

title: Kalshi Ramps Up Effort to Build Markets for AI Computing Power
title_cn: Kalshi 加大力度打造人工智能算力市场
summary: Kalshi Inc. has created a tool that plots the future price of computing power, joining the ranks of exchange and index operators attempting to build markets around the commodity powering artificial intelligence.

title: Uber Is In Advanced Talks on Delivery Hero Takeover
title_cn: 优步正在就送货英雄收购进行高级谈判
summary: Ride-hailing giant Uber Technologies Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire German food-delivery company Delivery Hero SE, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Nebius to Sell $1 Billion in AI Capacity to Reflection
title_cn: Nebius 将向 Reflection 出售 10 亿美元的人工智能产能
summary: Cloud provider Nebius Group NV agreed to sell more than $1 billion worth of computing power to Reflection AI, a developer of artificial intelligence models that was launched by two former Google DeepMind researchers.

title: AI Investment Race Could Turn Debt-Fueled Boom to Bust, BIS Says
title_cn: 国际清算银行表示，人工智能投资竞赛可能会将债务推动的繁荣转为萧条
summary: The race to build infrastructure for artificial intelligence is on track to surpass previous technological booms that ended up in severe market disruptions, the Bank for International Settlements said.

title: Bailey Says BOE Might Need to Respond If an AI Bubble Bursts
title_cn: 贝利表示，如果人工智能泡沫破裂，京东方可能需要做出回应
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey warned that the fallout from an artificial intelligence stocks bubble bursting would reach the UK economy and could prompt a response in interest rates. He made the comments during a testimony before Parliament’s Treasury Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Gets Rare Bear Rating as KeyBanc Downgrades on Demand Risk
title_cn: KeyBanc 按需风险降级，苹果罕见获得熊市评级
summary: Apple Inc. received a rare bearish rating as KeyBanc Capital Markets downgraded the stock to underweight, citing concerns over both demand and valuation.

title: Private Capital Is Plugging State Spending Gap, Apollo's Zelter Says
title_cn: 阿波罗的泽尔特表示，私人资本正在填补国家支出缺口
summary: Apollo Global Management President Jim Zelter says private capital is stepping in to fill a financing gap left by governments whose balance sheets can no longer support large-scale industrial capital expenditure. "Government pocketbooks aren’t as buoyant to be able to provide that," Zelter tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Famitsu at 40: Conspiracies, Clicks and the Future of Gaming Media
title_cn: Fami通 40 周年：阴谋、点击和游戏媒体的未来
summary: The weekly publication wears its love of games proudly

title: China Solar Giant Longi Green Sees Deeper First-Half Loss
title_cn: 中国太阳能巨头隆基绿能上半年亏损扩大
summary: Longi Green Energy Technology Co. expects its net loss to widen in the first half, despite a surge in solar exports earlier in the year.

title: Singapore Court Declines Stay of Byju’s Founder’s Sentence
title_cn: 新加坡法院拒绝暂缓Byju创始人的刑期
summary: The High Court of Singapore declined a stay on the six-month jail sentence of Byju Raveendran, meaning the founder of the failed education startup risks going to prison if he returns to the city-state.

title: Fed’s Three Picks for Task Force Show AI Bullishness
title_cn: 美联储特别工作组的三名人选显示了对人工智能的看好
summary: Kevin Warsh has argued AI could allow the economy to expand faster without generating as much inflation.

title: Job Hunters Are Using AI to Cheat in Interviews, and Failing at the Office
title_cn: 求职者使用人工智能在面试中作弊，并在办公室失败
summary: This has left managers paranoid — and scrambling to reverse course.

title: Samsung Is Said in Early Discussions on Potential US Listing
title_cn: 据称三星正在就美国上市的可能性进行早期讨论
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. is in the early stages of exploring a potential offering of American depositary receipts, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: ECB Digital Euro Trial Enlists Firms from Revolut to UniCredit
title_cn: 欧洲央行数字欧元试验招募了从 Revolut 到 UniCredit 的公司
summary: Revolut Bank UAB, UniCredit SpA and Deutsche Bank AG are among 36 payment service providers that will participate in a digital euro trial, the European Central Bank said on Tuesday.

title: New York Leads Nation in Moratorium on New Large Data Centers
title_cn: 纽约率先暂停新建大型数据中心
summary: New York will be the first state to issue a moratorium on new hyperscale data centers as localities across the country grapple with how to regulate the proliferation of energy-hungry facilities.

title: Malaysia Launches Probe Into Srinivasan’s Johor Startup School
title_cn: 马来西亚对斯里尼瓦桑柔佛创业学校展开调查
summary: Malaysian authorities have launched an immigration probe into a school for technology startups, just months after investor Balaji Srinivasan pitched the educational facility to officials and called for policies to support the project.

title: Philippine Outsourcing Group Cuts Revenue and Jobs Forecasts on AI
title_cn: 菲律宾外包集团下调人工智能收入和就业预测
summary: The Philippines’ main business-process outsourcing group cut its industry revenue and job forecasts — and even warned of possible shrinking future business — with the emergence of artificial intelligence, shifting geopolitical conditions and increased competition.

title: Ericsson Falls as Component Costs Weigh on Networks Unit
title_cn: 组件成本拖累网络部门 爱立信股价下跌
summary: Ericsson AB’s shares fell by the most in about 18 months after the Swedish telecommunications network company said margins for its main business will come under pressure this quarter.

title: State Street to Continue Buying Tech Dips, Veitmane Says
title_cn: 维特曼表示，道富银行将继续买入科技股
summary: Marija Veitmane, equity research head at State Street Global Markets, discusses the artificial intelligence trade and why she sees opportunities in software stocks. "We see analysts stabilizing their margin expectation revenue," Veitmane tells Bloomberg Television. "At the same time, we see institutional investors starting to buy from this big, big underweight position," she adds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Billionaire: Nuclear Fusion Is Key to AI Future
title_cn: 软银亿万富翁：核聚变是人工智能未来的关键
summary: SoftBank founder Masayoshi Son said that in the not-so-distant future, nuclear fusion technology will offer the most realistic solution for powering AI data centers’ ballooning needs. He speaks at an annual SoftBank World event in Tokyo.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Says Fed Doesn't Want to Be in the 'Bailout Business'
title_cn: 沃什表示美联储不想参与“救助业务”
summary: "We want to be in a position where we're not bailing out anybody, including crypto," Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh says during testimony before the House Financial Services Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Reform UK’s Widdecombe Murdered in ‘Targeted Attack,’ Police Say
title_cn: 警方称，改革英国的维德科姆在“有针对性的袭击”中被谋杀
summary: Reform UK politician Ann Widdecombe was killed in a “targeted attack,” British counter terrorism police said on Tuesday.

title: Trump Backs Off 20% Fee For Strait of Hormuz Shipments
title_cn: 特朗普取消对霍尔木兹海峡货物征收 20% 的费用
summary: President Donald Trump backed away from his plan to impose a 20% charge on cargo shipments through the Strait of Hormuz after the proposal was widely panned as impractical.

title: Second Fatal ICE Shooting in Days Roils New Enforcement Push
title_cn: 数日内发生的第二起致命 ICE 枪击事件引发新的执法行动
summary: State and federal authorities are investigating the fatal shooting of a man by immigration agents in Maine, the second in a week, as a recent nationwide surge in detention efforts raises concerns over the agency’s tactics.

title: Five Ways Putin Is in Trouble Over His War in Ukraine
title_cn: 普京因乌克兰战争而陷入困境的五种方式
summary: Vladimir Putin is facing mounting pressures from the war he started in Ukraine. Anthony Halpin explains five ways the Russian president is in trouble. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Five Ways Putin Is in Trouble Over His War in Ukraine
title_cn: 普京因乌克兰战争而陷入困境的五种方式
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin faces mounting pressures from the war he started in Ukraine. Many of these are now proving harder to contain than during the early years of the full-scale invasion.

title: Warsh Says Fed Is 'Honored' to Be Independent
title_cn: 沃什称美联储“很荣幸”保持独立
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh honors the central bank's independence when asked by US Representative Nydia M. Velázquez (D-NY) if he works for President Donald Trump during testimony at the House Financial Services Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Truce Collapses as Attacks Worsen, Blockade Restarts
title_cn: 随着袭击加剧、封锁重启，美伊休战破裂
summary:
The interim peace between the US and Iran effectively collapsed after American forces reimposed a naval blockade and launched another wave of airstrikes, while Tehran attacked more oil tankers sailing through the Strait of Hormuz.
Lindsay Newman, Associate Fellow at Chatham House, breaks down the latest escalation in the US-Iran war. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rockefeller's Fleming Warns About the Growing US Debt Burden
title_cn: 洛克菲勒的弗莱明警告美国债务负担不断增加
summary: Rockefeller Capital Management President and CEO Greg Fleming says the growing U.S. debt burden is his biggest economic concern, while he says AI could help ease inflation through productivity gains. This interview was recorded on May 13, 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Hits Russian Refineries, Ships; Moscow Targets Odesa
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击俄罗斯炼油厂和船舶；莫斯科瞄准敖德萨
summary: Kyiv struck a slew of Russian energy targets overnight, while Moscow hit fuel facilities in the Ukrainian port of Odesa in a fresh wave of tit-for-tat attacks.

title: India Wins Bigger Duty-Free Steel Export Quota in UK Trade Deal
title_cn: 印度在英国贸易协议中获得更大的免税钢铁出口配额
summary: India has renegotiated a higher quota for duty-free exports of steel to the UK under a free trade pact the two nations signed last year, according to Commerce Secretary Rajesh Agrawal.

title: China Rips NY Times on Taiwan After Reporter Expelled
title_cn: 记者被驱逐后，中国在台湾问题上猛烈抨击《纽约时报》
summary: China condemned the New York Times for its reporting on Taiwan, escalating a dispute that led to the expulsion of a journalist from the world’s second-biggest economy.

title: UAE Oil Tankers Attacked While Sailing Dark Through Hormuz
title_cn: 阿联酋油轮在黑暗中穿越霍尔木兹海峡时遭到袭击
summary: Two United Arab Emirates-linked supertankers came under attack while sailing “dark” through the Strait of Hormuz, threatening one of the main methods of getting non-Iranian crude to the global market during the war.

title: India Tightens Rules to Fight Forced Labor in Supply Chains
title_cn: 印度收紧规则打击供应链中的强迫劳动
summary: India is strengthening measures to combat forced labor in its supply chains amid a US investigation into forced-labor policies in several countries.

title: Fed's Warsh Has to Communicate More, Says Opinion's Dudley
title_cn: 《意见》的达德利表示，美联储沃什必须进行更多沟通
summary: William Dudley, former president of the Federal Reserve Bank of New York and Bloomberg Opinion Columnist, says Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh has to communicate more with markets, or he'll become less influential. He appears on "Bloomberg Surveillance" to talk about Warsh's testimony before Congress. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukrainian Lawmakers Vote to Remove Premier in Zelenskyy Shake-Up
title_cn: 乌克兰立法者投票罢免泽连斯基人事变动中的总理
summary: Ukraine’s parliament approved the resignation of the country’s prime minister, who stepped down as part of President Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s surprise move to overhaul his government ahead of winter.

title: US-Iran Truce Collapses as Attacks Worsen, Blockade Restarts
title_cn: 随着袭击加剧、封锁重启，美伊休战破裂
summary: The interim peace between the US and Iran effectively collapsed after American forces reimposed a naval blockade and launched another wave of airstrikes, while Tehran attacked more oil tankers sailing through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Arboleda Named Colombian Energy Minister Amid Blackout Risk
title_cn: 阿尔博莱达在停电风险中被任命为哥伦比亚能源部长
summary: Colombia’s incoming government tapped electricity industry insider María Nohemí Arboleda as mines and energy minister as dry weather raises the risk of power blackouts in the coming months.

title: Supreme Court Justices in Spotlight at Rare Capitol Hill Testimony
title_cn: 最高法院法官在罕见的国会山证词中成为焦点
summary: Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan will appear in back-to-back hearings

title: Lithuania Gets New Cabinet That Aims to Mend Ties With China
title_cn: 立陶宛新内阁旨在修复与中国的关系
summary: Lithuanian lawmakers backed a new government led by Prime Minister Mindaugas Sinkevicius, which reaffirmed its staunch support for Ukraine and plans to normalize ties with China.

title: UK Wasted £10 Billion on Covid Gear in Pandemic, Review Finds
title_cn: 审查发现英国在新冠疫情期间浪费了 100 亿英镑
summary: The UK wasted almost £10 billion ($13 billion) during the Covid-19 pandemic on protective equipment such as masks and gowns that were either defective or remained unused, the country’s inquiry into the outbreak found.

title: Trump Plans Hormuz Toll as US-Iran Truce Collapses
title_cn: 随着美伊休战破裂，特朗普计划在霍尔木兹海峡造成伤亡
summary: The US hit Iran with more strikes after announcing plans for a 20% fee on ships using the Strait of Hormuz. In response, Tehran attacked more oil tankers sailing through the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anwar’s Party Quits Malacca Government On Strains With Ally
title_cn: 安华政党因与盟友关系紧张退出马六甲政府
summary: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s Pakatan Harapan has quit the Malacca state government that’s led by federal ally Barisan Nasional following disagreement over a bill, further straining relations after battling each other in the Johor elections.

title: Chile Economic Euphoria Crashes to Earth as President Kast Faces 1% Growth
title_cn: 总统卡斯特面临 1% 的增长，智利经济欣欣向荣
summary: Chileans elected a pro-market president to revive the economy. They are now getting a reality check as one of Latin America’s richest nations flirts with recession while a rightward regional shift heralds more competition for investment.

title: How the Middle East Has Been Changed Forever
title_cn: 中东如何永远改变
summary: More than 1,000 days of war have upended a region already known for its volatility.

title: Singapore Ministers Win Defamation Case Against Bloomberg
title_cn: 新加坡部长赢得针对彭博社的诽谤案
summary: Two Singapore ministers won a defamation case against Bloomberg LP over the contents of a December 2024 news article about the island nation’s property market.

title: Indian Activist’s Health Worsens in Hunger Strike for Students
title_cn: 印度活动人士因学生绝食而健康状况恶化
summary: The health of a well-known Indian activist is deteriorating more than two weeks into his hunger strike over exam paper leaks, putting pressure on the government to respond to one of the country’s most prominent youth-driven protests in years.

title: Bulgaria Quits Pro-Ukrainian Coalition of the Willing
title_cn: 保加利亚退出亲乌克兰自愿联盟
summary: Bulgaria will no longer be a part of the so-called coalition of the willing, a group of nations that support Ukraine against Russian aggression, according to Prime Minister Rumen Radev.

title: India Summons Iran Envoy After Seafarer Dies in Ship Attacks
title_cn: 海员在船只袭击中丧生后印度召见伊朗特使
summary: India summoned Iran’s deputy ambassador to protest after an Indian seafarer was killed and 10 others injured in attacks on two commercial vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz.
